title: Get medRxiv Preprints by Date Range
description: Retrieve preprint metadata for all papers posted to medRxiv within a date range, paginated at 100 results per call.

collection.title: Characteristics of and Important Lessons From the Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) Outbreak in China
collection.authors: Zu, ZY; Jiang, MD; Xu, PP; Chen, W; Ni, QQ; Lu, GM; Zhang, LJ
collection.author_corresponding_institution: Department of Radiology, Nanjing Drum Tower Hospital
collection.abstract: Background: Since December 2019, coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) has emerged in Wuhan and rapidly spread throughout China. We summarized demographic and clinical features, treatment and outcomes of COVID-19 patients.
